name: agy-gate
description: Cross-model code review for Claude Code: review, adversarial review, and a converging stop-gate, powered by the Antigravity CLI (agy) on your Gemini subscription.

stopReviewGate.title: Enable stop review-gate
stopReviewGate.description: Run a converging Gemini review when a turn ends.

stopGateOnUnavailable.title: Stop-gate behavior when Gemini is unavailable

notReviewedStreakLimit.title: Escalate after N consecutive NOT REVIEWED turns
notReviewedStreakLimit.description: After this many consecutive unreviewed turns, escalate the warning with an actionable remediation.

reviewModel.title: Review model (Gemini family only)
reviewModel.description: Gemini model used for review (e.g. 'Gemini 3.1 Pro (High)'). Non-Gemini models are rejected to preserve cross-family review.

maxIterations.title: Stop-gate max iterations
maxIterations.description: Hard ceiling on stop-gate review->fix rounds before the loop opens and hands to a human.

maxReviewsPerDay.title: Daily automated-review cap (quota guard)
maxReviewsPerDay.description: 0 = no cap (default). Set >0 to enforce a daily ceiling on automated reviews.

reviewTimeoutMs.title: Review timeout (ms)
reviewTimeoutMs.description: Hard ceiling on a single agy --print review; a hung review becomes a clean TIMEOUT instead of a stuck shell. Default 300000 (5 min).
